Book a Consultation Our Services

Our Services

Deep expertise across industrial automation, transportation technology, and modern software development.

Industrial Software & Automation

We design and develop SCADA systems, PLC programming solutions, and HMI interfaces that bring visibility and control to complex industrial operations. From compressor monitoring to cooling tower automation, our team has hands-on experience with Honeywell Experion PKS, Rockwell FactoryTalk, and Siemens TIA Portal — delivering reliable automation from panel testing through onsite commissioning.

Railway & Transportation Technology

Our engineers build mission-critical software for the rail industry, including Train Control & Monitoring Systems (TCMS), HMI applications for advanced signaling (CBTC, ETCS, AWS-TPWS), and diagnostic tools like TDR-JRU recorders. We've contributed to major projects including the UK's Elizabeth Line, handling everything from software development and rig testing to live train commissioning — all in compliance with ERA safety standards.

Backend & Cloud Development

We architect and build scalable backend systems using Java, Spring Boot, and Spring Cloud. Our microservices follow industry best practices — service discovery with Eureka, centralized routing via API Gateway, circuit breakers with Resilience4j, and JWT-based security. Every service is containerized with Docker, managed through Maven, and deployed via CI/CD pipelines for fast, reliable releases.

Embedded Systems

From concept to production, we develop embedded solutions spanning firmware, microcontroller programming (MSP430, 8051), and custom PCB design. Our work includes capacitive touch interfaces, RFID-integrated systems, and communication protocols (TCP/IP, Modbus, RS-485/232). We manage the full product lifecycle — prototype validation, component-level diagnostics, quality verification, and manufacturing handoff.

Web Application Development

We build modern, full-stack web applications with React on the frontend and Spring Boot on the backend. Our solutions feature responsive UI design, RESTful API integration, role-based access control, and database architectures designed for performance and maintainability. Whether it's an internal tool or a customer-facing platform, we deliver clean, production-ready code.

Quality Assurance & Testing

Quality is built into everything we do. We bring rigorous testing practices across functional testing, systems testing, and VCS environment validation. Our teams operate within Agile/Scrum frameworks, using tools like IBM Rational DOORS and RTC Eclipse for traceability and sprint management. From safety-critical railway software to cloud microservices, we ensure every release meets the highest standards of reliability.

Why MindLab Technology?

With deep expertise across industrial automation, transportation technology, and modern software development, MindLab Technology bridges the gap between operational systems and digital innovation. Our engineers have delivered mission-critical solutions for global rail operators, industrial manufacturers, and technology companies.

  • ✓ 7+ years of experience in railway signaling & embedded systems
  • ✓ Proven delivery on safety-critical and compliance-driven projects
  • ✓ End-to-end capability — from firmware to cloud
  • ✓ Agile teams with onsite commissioning experience
